wikitext: []: Do you have questions? All of Evangelion explained             Quote Post by ClassyCrusader0330 » Fri Jan 03, 2025 10:24 am I’ve watched the show since I was 13 (34 now) and grew up in the film industry. Because of that I think I might have some insight that might help others understand the show better, whether you’re a newbie or a vet, I’d like to hear your feedback on the video to see if I need to make any changes as I want to make it the definitive place to answer all questions, the reviews have come back with positive feedback so far. With that being said check out my video! All of Evangelion Explained https://youtu.be/HNPcyds7xSI?si=bUDHAySzvUXDly6b
